justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's requested times and dates throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and then asked the user to pick a new time without offering any alternative options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent repeatedly asked the user to provide new times without offering any proactive suggestions, leading to a very long and unproductive conversation.
justifications.customer_experience: The repeated apologies and the agent's inability to proactively suggest available slots made the conversation frustrating and inefficient for the customer.

judge_scores.overall_notes: The agent was stuck in a loop of reporting unavailability and asking the user for new times, which led to a very poor customer experience.
